visual: Steps forward in a bow stance while the arms separate diagonally, one hand rising to eye level and the other sweeping down past the hip, repeated left and right.
motion_description: The person starts with weight resting on the right leg and steps forward with the left foot, planting the heel first. As the weight steadily shifts forward onto the left leg, the torso rotates approximately 45 degrees to face forward. Simultaneously, the arms separate in a continuous flow: the left arm arcs forward and upward to chest height with the palm facing inward, while the right hand sweeps downward to rest beside the right hip.
